def negative_python_perf_layer_serialization_json_dumps_for_equality_or_hash():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_serialization_json_dumps_for_equality_or_hash"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Serialization and deserialization. Flag json.dumps used only for equality checks, hashing, or dedup keys."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
